title: Need More Structures
description: Adds QoL Structures to the game.
body:
Adds various(4) QoL structures to the game.
> #### Animal Habitats ![pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dfb4ad4eb352fd110b0ace9b5826f5db12f5f65.jpeg)
Pig Base A muddy little habitat for a small pig family of 3. > You can find anywhere in savannas
![snowgolem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdc7397a2e40101f670db1ed33d41a43e068eec8.jpeg)
SnowGolem Base A snowy hillock with snow golems inside it. > You can find anywhere in snowy biomes
![armadillo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f932815a97c8b7a11b823f6be165740d03d6c86.jpeg)
Armadillo Base A little habitat for our armored friends. > You can find anywhere in savannas
... coming soon...
> #### Random Structures ![vault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a54d8ee126f4e054284c785ac96907cd22c2c416.jpeg)
Vault An almost round structure for a **vault** outside Trial Chamber _don't forget to check under_ > You can find anywhere in overworld and nether
... coming soon...
### Take a loot at my other projects ### [Fair Fishing Loot](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fair-fishing-loot) ### [No Piglin Brutes 1.16.1+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-piglinbrutes) ### [Shield of Undying](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shield-of-undying)
